span.p: CAC rising or above LTV floor

span.p:
Creative frequency above 3.0
in last 7 days?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CREATIVE FATIGUE
rotate creative before scaling budget

span.p:
Audience size shrinking?
iOS / signal loss reducing reach?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AUDIENCE EXHAUSTION
expand targeting or test new segments

span.p:
Platform iROAS vs last-click
ROAS diverging?

span.p:
ATTRIBUTION INFLATION
run incrementality test before cutting spend

span.p:
AUCTION PRESSURE
seasonal or competitive CPM spike - hold or adjust bid strategy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FUNNEL LEAK DOWNSTREAM
check checkout and product-page conversion - CAC may be a symptom not a cause
